title: Cody Hewitt’s CV
text:
Computer Science Major, Brigham Young University-Idaho.
hew24004@byui.edu | Projects


Working toward a bachelor’s degree and creating side projects.


Object-oriented programming, Python, C#, and data science.



Machine learning classifiers, Polars dataframes, multi-class project architecture, and cross-platform software rendering.




Sept 2024 - Present

Bachelor’s Degree Program in Computer Science.
Coursework in Data Science and Computer Programming.
Completed introductory programming tracks and advanced into complex object-oriented program architecture.




Sept 2024 - Present
Event & Fitness Metric Tracker

Implemented multi-class final project modules establishing complex event logic.
Developed integrated fitness metric tracking components.

Data Analytics & Machine Learning

Wrote, tested, and debugged complex scripts using Python and C#.
Built analytical solutions utilizing Polars dataframes and machine learning classifiers.




Languages & Frameworks

Python, C#, and Polars.

Hardware & Ecosystem

Managed daily software engineering tasks, rendering, and coursework utilizing an M1 MacBook Air within the Apple Silicon Ecosystem.

Last updated: July 2026
